name: Mirofish Plugin — Miro Board Integration for CCEM APM
description: APM plugin exposing Miro REST API v2 operations as plugin actions for research + coalescence workflows. Formation agents post findings as sticky notes on a shared board.

stories.title: Miro REST API v2 :httpc client with rate-limit retry
acceptance_criteria: MiroClient uses Erlang :httpc (no external HTTP deps)
Reads access token from MIRO_ACCESS_TOKEN env var or ~/.config/mirofish/token
Handles 429 with Retry-After header, retries once (max 10s wait)
All public functions return {:ok, map()} | {:error, reason} tagged tuples
parse_response_body/1 exposed for unit testing

stories.title: MirofishPlugin module implementing PluginBehaviour
acceptance_criteria: Implements plugin_name, plugin_description, plugin_version, plugin_scope (:ccem)
list_endpoints/0 returns 9 action descriptors
handle_action/3 dispatches: list_boards, get_board, create_board, create_sticky, create_frame, create_text, list_items, delete_item, coalesce_findings
coalesce_findings bulk-creates sticky notes in a 4-column grid
Atom keys in params are normalized to strings
Invalid params return {:error, {:invalid_params, action}}
Unknown actions return {:error, {:unknown_action, action}}

stories.title: Registry integration — auto-register MirofishPlugin
acceptance_criteria: ApmV5.Plugins.Mirofish.MirofishPlugin added to @default_plugins in PluginRegistry
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
Plugin is discoverable via PluginRegistry.list_plugins/0 at runtime

stories.title: Test coverage for plugin + client response parsing
acceptance_criteria: 16 ExUnit tests, 0 failures
Plugin metadata tests (name/version/description/scope)
list_endpoints returns 9 descriptors
Missing token returns {:error, :no_token} when no file and no env
Unknown action and missing params error paths covered
coalesce_findings with empty list returns {:ok, %{created: 0}}
parse_response_body handles JSON object, array, empty body, non-JSON, charlist, realistic sticky-note response

stories.title: SKILL documentation at ~/.claude/skills/mirofish/SKILL.md
acceptance_criteria: Frontmatter with name, description, version, scope, tier, methodology
Auth setup documented (env var + token file)
All 9 action commands documented with examples
Integration patterns with /formation and /coalesce explained
Rate limit guidance included
Out-of-scope items listed for v1.0.0
